name: MoneyGram
description_short: Memphis MoneyGram at 32 S 2nd St offers fast check cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Memphis location sits at 32 S 2nd St, a standalone storefront in downtown Memphis, TN. As a dedicated check-cashing store, it's positioned for quick access during business hours—Monday through Thursday 8 AM to 6 PM, Friday 8 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 3 PM.

This MoneyGram location specializes in check cashing and money transfer services. Whether you need to cash a paycheck, deposit checks for business, or send money domestically, the staff can assist. Call 901-525-6544 to confirm service availability or ask about fees.

For Memphis residents and visitors, bring a valid government-issued ID—required for all transactions. Visit when you need fast check cashing without the hassle of bank teller lines. MoneyGram handles high-volume transfers and cashing efficiently.
pros: 48+ locations across Memphis providing widespread geographic coverage for convenient access
Extended operating hours (many locations open until 8-11 PM) through retail partners like CVS and Walmart
Omnichannel capability: initiate transfers online and pick up in-person, or conduct full transactions at locations
Partnerships with trusted major retailers (Walmart, CVS) and established check-cashing operators (Ace Cash Express)
Interactive map-based location finder with search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Ability to send and receive money both online and offline without requiring a bank account
Operations at supermarkets and grocery stores (La Fiesta) adding convenience to routine shopping trips
cons: No pricing information displayed on website; customers must call or visit locations to learn fee amounts
Service quality and hours depend on individual partner retailers, creating inconsistent customer experience
Higher transaction costs compared to bank wire transfers and modern digital remittance services
Limited to partner location availability; cannot access service at all hours or all neighborhoods equally
Requires physical location visit for cash pickup, reducing convenience versus fully digital solutions
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank wire services
Customers needing to send/receive money outside of standard 9-5 banking hours
People without smartphones or internet access who prefer in-person transaction options
Occasional domestic money transfer users seeking convenience over lowest cost
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and occasional money transfer users who prioritize location convenience and extended hours over competitive pricing. The primary caveat is that this is a premium-priced service suitable for infrequent transfers; regular international remittance senders would benefit from lower-cost digital alternatives, and the lack of upfront pricing transparency requires customers to contact locations directly for fee information.
services: Domestic money transfers to other MoneyGram locations
Online money transfer initiation with in-person pickup
In-person money send and receive at retail partner locations
Money transfer through CVS pharmacy locations
Money transfer through Ace Cash Express check-cashing outlets
Money transfer through La Fiesta supermarket locations
Location search and store hours information
meta_description: Memphis, TN MoneyGram at 32 S 2nd St offers fast check cashing and money transfer services.
